description: Collect the date and time for the party from the user
success_criterion: Date and time are confirmed by the user

description: Search for available venues in Haymarket that can accommodate 12 people on the specified date and time
success_criterion: List of available venues with details is retrieved

description: Confirm venue selection with the user
success_criterion: User selects a venue from the available options

description: Book the selected venue for the party
success_criterion: Reservation is confirmed with a booking reference
